home.headline: Two Countries,
home.description: TAEB is a prestigious organization that strengthens professional networks between Turkey and the United States, building a solid bridge across two continents through education and career opportunities.
home.impactDescription: The tangible value we create for our community and the support we provide to the next generation of professionals.
home.totalScholarshipDesc: By the end of 2025, we provided $250k in scholarships to pharmacy students and pharmacists.
home.masterScholarshipDesc: By the end of 2025, we provided $65k in master scholarships to pharmacists.
home.freeInternshipDesc: More than 150 pharmacy students and pharmacists gained free internship experience in the US.

about.headline: A Knowledge Bridge
about.description: Since 2014, TAEB has been strengthening academic, cultural, and professional cooperation between Turkey and the USA with an institutional vision.
about.activeMembersLabel: Our total number of members in Turkey and America
about.historyDescription: Since 2014, TAEB has been bridging the gap between Turkish and American pharmacy, supporting innovation and professional development beyond borders.
about.year2014Desc: We set out to bring together the potential of Turkish professionals in Turkey and the USA. In our early years, we prioritized academic exchange and local networking.
about.year2018Desc: The foundations of our United States internship program were laid.
about.year2019Desc: The first group of student interns was successfully hosted in the United States.
about.year2020_1Desc: OTC News magazine began publication to share professional and industry developments.
about.year2020_2Desc: Continuous support and information activities were carried out for pharmacists and the community during the pandemic.
about.year2021Desc: Pharmacist Ömer Sarışın assumed his role as TAEB Turkey Representative, strengthening our local operations.
about.missionText: To deepen social and professional ties between Turkey and the United States through academic, commercial, and cultural projects, providing a value-creating ecosystem for our members across both regions.
about.visionText: To be the most trusted and effective NGO of transatlantic cooperation in the digital age, bringing together future leaders and ideas on a global platform.

projects.headline: Shaping the Future in Innovation and Healthcare.
projects.description: As TAEB Association, we create a global impact through our prestigious projects that bring together the worlds of pharmacy and technology.
projects.persovitDesc: Persovit delivers personalized daily supplement packs formulated around individual health goals — combining vitamins, minerals, amino acids, botanical extracts, probiotics, and omega fats into one coordinated regimen that brings pharmacist-guided, data-driven nutritional support to everyday life.
projects.smartBoxDesc: Smart Box is Spencer Health Solutions' in-home medication management platform. With audio-visual dose alerts, pharmacy-prepared pre-loaded refills, and real-time adherence monitoring, it helps patients stay on track at home while giving healthcare providers actionable insights through the spencerCare web portal.
projects.ctaDescription: Bring your ideas that will make a difference in the world of healthcare and pharmacy to life with TAEB.

testimonial_1.quote: TAEB is the kind of community you wish you had earlier. From mentorship to real guidance, TAEB makes ambitious goals feel less intimidating and a lot more possible.
testimonial_1.name: Ecz. Ulku Irem Keskin

testimonial_2.quote: The experience equipped me with strong pharmacy business foundations that continue to influence my approach as a pharmacy owner.
testimonial_2.name: Ecz. Cagla Mengulluoglu

testimonial_3.quote: Through the TAEB's guidance, mentorship, and a genuinely supportive community, TAEB makes big goals feel achievable and you never feel like you're figuring it out alone.
testimonial_3.name: Ecz. Arif Cinkaya

testimonial_4.quote: During this internship, I strengthened my understanding of pharmacy business processes.
testimonial_4.name: Ecz. Mertcan Okatan

seo.privacyDesc: Learn about how TAEB collects, uses, and protects your personal data in accordance with GDPR and KVKK.

privacy.headline: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: The Turkish American Pharmacists Association (TAEB) is committed to protecting the privacy and security of your personal data. This comprehensive Privacy Policy outlines our practices regarding the collection, use, processing, and disclosure of your information in compliance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and the Personal Data Protection Law (KVKK). By accessing our platform or using our services, you consent to the data practices described herein.

sections.title: 1. Data Controller Identity
sections.content: Under the GDPR and KVKK, TAEB acts as the primary Data Controller. We decide how and why your personal information is processed. Queries regarding your data or our practices can be directed to our official contact channel at contact@taeb.us.

sections.title: 2. Categories of Personal Data Collected
sections.content: To deliver our services effectively, we collect several categories of personal data. This includes Identity Information (such as name and signature), Contact Information (such as email address and phone number), Professional Information (such as academic degree, university, and employment history), and Technical Data (such as IP addresses and browser configurations when you interact with our website).

sections.title: 3. Lawful Basis and Purpose of Processing
sections.content: We process your personal data strictly upon established legal grounds. These include your explicit consent, the necessity to perform a contract (such as membership agreements or event registrations), compliance with legal obligations, and our legitimate interests in improving our services and communicating relevant administrative updates.

sections.title: 4. Data Retention and Security
sections.content: TAEB implements robust technical and organizational security protocols to protect your data against unauthorized access, alteration, loss, or destruction. Your data is retained only for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes outlined in this policy or to comply with statutory retention periods under applicable laws.

sections.title: 5. Third-Party Disclosures and International Transfers
sections.content: As an international organization operating between Turkey and the United States, your data may be transferred across borders. We ensure that any such transfers comply with GDPR and KVKK requirements, utilizing standard contractual clauses and ensuring adequate levels of data protection by our third-party service providers (such as hosting platforms and mailing list managers).

sections.title: 6. Your Statutory Rights
sections.content: Subject to applicable data protection laws, you possess the right to request access to your personal data, seek rectification of inaccurate data, request erasure ('right to be forgotten'), object to or restrict processing, and request data portability. Furthermore, you retain the right to withdraw your consent at any point without affecting the lawfulness of processing based on consent before its withdrawal.

sections.title: 7. Updates to This Privacy Policy
sections.content: We reserve the right to amend this Privacy Policy periodically to reflect changes in our operational practices or statutory requirements. We encourage users to frequently check this page. Continued use of our services after any amendments constitutes your acknowledgment of the updated policy.

sections.title: 8. Contact Us
sections.content: Should you have any inquiries, complaints, or requests regarding this Privacy Policy or your personal data, please contact our Data Protection Officer directly via email at contact@taeb.us. We are dedicated to addressing your concerns promptly.
